description: Illustrative stable-value token pattern for reserve, redemption, and issuer evidence.

authority.name: Example Stable-Value Issuer
authority.delegationScope: Defines reserve, issuance, burn, redemption, and reporting controls for this example.

lifecycle.migrationNotes: Classification as e-money, asset-referenced token, deposit token, or other asset depends on jurisdiction and issuer facts.

rightsModel.legalClaim: Holder claim depends on issuer terms and applicable law.
rightsModel.economicRights: Value reference is maintained through reserve and redemption policy.
rightsModel.redemptionRights: Redemption process, limits, fees, and timing must be documented by issuer.
